property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-20\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\julia\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Users\julia\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\MATLAB\R2023b\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Users\julia\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin;C:\Users\julia\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\julia\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\ghcup\bin;C:\Users\julia\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;;c:\Users\julia\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommandc:\Users\julia\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.
